caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, over-ear headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "I ON NEVER DO SHIT" is speaking into a professional microphone. He is in a room that appears to be a clothing shop or studio, with various framed photos on the wall behind him and clothing racks and a mannequin wearing a white shirt in the background. Two logos are visible on screen: a black circular logo on the left and a red "BODLY" logo on the right. Across the sequence, the man is captured in a mid-shot, speaking and shifting his facial expression slightly. He looks towards someone off-camera to his right, his mouth opening and closing as he talks, while his overall posture and position in the frame remain consistent.
